Video.summary: A group of wagons begins to run out of food and water after becoming trapped in a hot desert.
Video.title: How Death Valley Got Its Name

Image.alt: How Death Valley Got Its Name
How Death Valley Got Its Name
How Death Valley Got Its Name
How Death Valley Got Its Name
How Death Valley Got Its Name
How Death Valley Got Its Name
How Death Valley Got Its Name
How Death Valley Got Its Name
How Death Valley Got Its Name

Video.summary: Two people set out into the desert in search of the lost Pegleg gold mine.
Video.title: The Lost Pegleg Mine

Video.summary: Mamie Jaggers is one of the only single women in the mining town of Bullfrog, Nevada.
Video.title: The Little Bullfrog Nugget

Video.summary: An embittered prospector denies his wife a purple silk dress.
Video.title: Cynthy's Dream Dress

Video.summary: Mary Helen Crosby conceals government papers in her umbrella to insure their safe arrival.
Video.title: The Lady with the Blue Silk Umbrella

Image.alt: The Lady with the Blue Silk Umbrella
The Lady with the Blue Silk Umbrella
The Lady with the Blue Silk Umbrella
The Lady with the Blue Silk Umbrella
The Lady with the Blue Silk Umbrella
The Lady with the Blue Silk Umbrella
The Lady with the Blue Silk Umbrella
The Lady with the Blue Silk Umbrella
The Lady with the Blue Silk Umbrella

Video.summary: Two men must find a way to stake a claim without going to jail.
Video.title: The Bandits of Panamint

Video.summary: A young Mormon wife takes drastic measures to cope with life on the prairie.
Video.title: Sego Lilies

Video.summary: A man arrives in Rawhide, Nevada, spends his last 10 dollars and becomes rich.
Video.title: Little Oscar's Millions

Video.summary: An ostracized woman saves her town.
Video.title: The Diamond Babe

Video.summary: Cavalry man Larry Brooks is escorting a group through peaceful Native territory when threats arise.
Video.title: One in a Hundred

Video.summary: A little girl grows up to become a performer in a vaudeville show.
Video.title: Lotta Crabtree

Video.summary: John Thompson wants to get the mail out during the winters and comes up with ways to make it happen.
Video.title: Snowshoe Thompson

Video.summary: Cowpoke Curt Morrison and pal Josh locate a spring on Native land soon to be opened to homesteaders.
Video.title: The Kickapoo Run

Video.summary: A member of the Laguna tribe refuses to return a venerated portrait to neighboring braves.
Video.title: The Saint's Portrait

Video.summary: Two partner prospectors sell out to the wealthy Spencer Gates and their lives take different paths.
Video.title: To Big Charlie from Little Charlie

Image.alt: To Big Charlie from Little Charlie
To Big Charlie from Little Charlie
To Big Charlie from Little Charlie
To Big Charlie from Little Charlie
To Big Charlie from Little Charlie
To Big Charlie from Little Charlie
To Big Charlie from Little Charlie
To Big Charlie from Little Charlie
To Big Charlie from Little Charlie

Video.summary: The story of Cherokee tribesman Sequoia, who developed the Cherokee written language.
Video.title: Sequoia

Video.summary: A man must collect back taxes and hires some muscle for assistance, but a surprise awaits him.
Video.title: Death and Taxes

Video.summary: Miners become hostile when they suspect an assayer has cheated them with deceptive evaluations.
Video.title: The Mormon's Grindstone

Video.summary: A grizzled old man charters a train to break the speed record between Los Angeles and Chicago.
Video.title: Death Valley Scotty

Video.summary: A crystal ball sends the seventh daughter of a seventh daughter West to seek her fortune.
Video.title: The Crystal Gazer

Video.summary: A quiet dressmaker for the dance hall girls in a Western mining camp is discovered to be Tiger Lil.
Video.title: The Little Dressmaker of Bodie

Video.summary: Blind and bitter Susie witnesses a stage robbery and her heightened senses play a key role.
Video.title: Sixth Sense

Video.summary: Jason Barnes takes a job on a railroad with a plan to marry a railroad executive's daughter.
Video.title: Way Station

Video.summary: As survivors of the Donner Party recuperate, William Eddy grieves the loss of his wife and children.
Video.title: The Hastings Cut-off

Video.summary: A man's resemblance to a killer lands him in jail and facing a murder charge.
Video.title: Alias James Stuart

Video.summary: A man who claims he can resurrect the dead poses a problem for killer Bill Groat.
Video.title: Miracle at Boot Hill

Video.summary: A missionary puts himself on the line to mediate a conflict between settlers and Navajo.
Video.title: The Peacemaker

Video.summary: A lawyer (Ronald Reagan) sues a man who killed a boy's dog.
Video.title: Tribute to the Dog

Video.summary: Sailor William Richardson falls in love with the Mexican comandante's daughter.
Video.title: The Water Bringer

Video.summary: The mayor of Deadwood comes up with a manufactured hero to lure tourists into his dying town.
Video.title: The Resurrection of Deadwood Dick

Video.summary: In the new state of New Mexico, a young woman decides to challenge the servitude system in court.
Video.title: Along Came Mariana

Video.summary: A desert dwelling couple struggle with life in Death Valley.
Video.title: Dress for a Desert Girl

Video.summary: Prospectors venture into Death Valley to find a legendary lost mine.
Video.title: A Friend Indeed

Video.summary: The story of how the Winchester repeating rifle helped to bring law and order to a new Idaho town.
Video.title: The Thirty-Caliber Town

Video.summary: Citizens gather to watch a man make good on his claim that his horse can swim the Catalina Channel.
Video.title: The World's Greatest Swimming Horse

Video.summary: A former outlaw takes the unenviable job of sheriff in a lawless town, and old habits die hard.
Video.title: A Restless Man

Video.summary: John Parker was raised by Comanches since he was a boy and wants to remain with his Native family.
Video.title: The Understanding

Video.summary: Renegade Natives led by a white man named Clay threaten the residents of a decommissioned fort.
Video.title: Long Night at Fort Lonely

Video.summary: Mormons must save the life of a dying man or face the wrath of his tribe.
Video.title: A Key for the Fort

Video.summary: A blue-eyed goat named Billy and a mother's ability to bake biscuits help abandoned family members.
Video.title: Biscuits and Billy the Kid

Video.summary: There's more than gold in store for prim Wilhelmina Vail when she tackles a claim in Utah territory.
Video.title: Talk to Me, Charley

Video.summary: A cowboy becomes an expert baker while competing for the daughter of a rancher.
Video.title: Crullers at Sundown!

Video.summary: Count Peter intends to wed a don's daughter, but a misunderstanding lands him in hot water.
Video.title: Count Me In, Count Me Out

Image.alt: Count Me In, Count Me Out
Count Me In, Count Me Out
Count Me In, Count Me Out
Count Me In, Count Me Out
Count Me In, Count Me Out
Count Me In, Count Me Out
Count Me In, Count Me Out
Count Me In, Count Me Out
Count Me In, Count Me Out

Video.summary: Two members of a wagon train try to reach help before their group dies of starvation.
Video.title: Out of the Valley of Death

Image.alt: Out of the Valley of Death
Out of the Valley of Death
Out of the Valley of Death
Out of the Valley of Death
Out of the Valley of Death
Out of the Valley of Death
Out of the Valley of Death
Out of the Valley of Death
Out of the Valley of Death

Video.summary: An old thief outwits lawmen by returning to his rundown shack on the U.S.-Republic of Texas border.
Video.title: Old Stape

Video.summary: This tale of misadventure focuses on Frank Baum's penning of The Wonderful Wizard of Oz.
Video.title: The Wizard of Aberdeen

Video.summary: A cowboy and a Native man join forces to secure dowries for their sweethearts.
Video.title: Amos and the Black Bull
